basics.name: Hanif
basics.label: Technical Project Manager | React E-commerce Specialist
basics.summary: Technical Project Manager with 5 years of blended experience in digital business operations and frontend architecture. Specializing in the React ecosystem, I act as the technical bridge between business stakeholders and development vendors. Proven track record of translating complex e-commerce requirements into strict technical scopes, enforcing UAT protocols, and monitoring CI/CD deployments to prevent vendor overbilling and ensure scalable architecture.

work.position: Independent Technical Consultant / Lead Project Manager
work.summary: Serve as primary technical liaison for high-stakes web commerce deployments, auditing vendor execution, managing timelines, and fixing critical workflow or pipeline blockers.
highlights: Acted as the primary technical liaison for an e-commerce build, translating business requirements into precise React component specifications, reducing vendor miscommunication and revision cycles by 40%.

Engineered and executed comprehensive User Acceptance Testing (UAT) protocols covering authentication, complex cart state management, and payment gateway (Midtrans/Xendit) integration, ensuring 0 critical bugs at launch.
Audited vendor deployment strategies, enforcing staging-to-production CI/CD pipelines via Vercel and GitHub Actions to guarantee high availability during traffic spikes.
Mandated the use of optimized state management and data fetching (React Query) to the vendor, resulting in a highly performant frontend architecture that reduced server load.

work.summary: Oversaw frontend implementation and agile sprint processes for collaborative product launches and digital solutions.
highlights: Built and maintained modular frontend architectures using React.js, translating UI/UX wireframes into functional, responsive web applications.
Managed 48-hour sprint deployments for digital product launches using Agile methodologies and tools like ClickUp and Discord for team orchestration.
Conducted analytical assessments (Importance-Performance Analysis and Pareto frameworks) on user data to dictate development priorities, ensuring engineering hours were spent on high-ROI features.

work.summary: Coordinated early system deployments and modular framework applications for enterprise planning simulations.
highlights: Led a 5-person team in the end-to-end planning and simulated deployment of an ERP system (P Mart) for retail operations, managing modular presentation and execution scripts.
Coordinated project timelines, managed stakeholder expectations, and maintained rigorous documentation for digital infrastructure projects.

projects.name: VeritasGuard
projects.description: An AI-driven security automation tool designed for secure log analysis and threat remediation orchestration.
highlights: Engineered high-performance Go-based concurrent processes to optimize log ingestion speeds.
Integrated Python-driven reasoning modules utilizing the Gemini API to intelligently classify threat vectors.

projects.name: Psych-Sentinel
projects.description: An automated workflow compliance and cognitive task monitoring dashboard.
highlights: Utilized PostgreSQL and Turso databases for data persistence layer logging and relational integrity.
Designed a responsive React-based dashboard displaying real-time system health metrics and audit logs.
